title: Galaxy Shooter Pro
excerpt: Unity WebGL arcade shooter with procedural enemies and power-ups
description: Developed a Unity-based 2D arcade shooter (Galaxy Shooter Pro) optimized for WebGL. Implemented enemy waves, bosses, power-ups, keyboard and touch controls, performance tuning for browser builds, scoring and persistence. Build available at galaxy-shoter-pro/ in this repository.

title: Augmented Reality Research
excerpt: Object trajectory prediction using AR and computer vision
description: Researched object trajectory prediction using AR and computer vision. Presented at UNIP Annual Research Convention (2013).

title: Mobile-Controlled Wheelchair Prototype
description: Capstone project: Built integrated hardware+software prototype for Bluetooth-based remote control. Showcased at campus outreach event.
